description: Case Style: Analog watch with a platic case that has a stainless steel back, has a rotatable bezel Dial Style: Black dial with a tachymeter inside, branding on the dial, yellow coloured hands and lime green hour marks Features: Screw to reset time Strap Style: Black plastic strap with a stainless steel buttefly clasp Water resistant up to 5 BAR Warranty: 1 year
